---
title: "What Quarto Can Do"
subtitle: "A hands-on example — built entirely with Quarto"
sidebar: example-sidebar
---

Quarto turns plain `.qmd` files into interactive websites, PDFs, and presentations —
no web development experience needed.

This mini-site explores the **sine function** and demonstrates Quarto's capabilities along the way.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Built with Quarto
Every element on this site — runnable code, interactive plots, and quizzes —
was written in plain text and rendered by Quarto.
:::

## Pages at a Glance

| | Page | What you'll see |
|:-:|------|-----------------|
| 1 | [Layout & Formatting](ep_layout.qmd) | Callouts, columns, tabs |
| 2 | [Code](ep_code.qmd) | Static, executable, and editable Python |
| 3 | [Visualizations](ep_visuals.qmd) | Interactive plot & diagram |
| 4 | [Quiz](ep_quiz.qmd) | Self-check questions |
| 5 | [References](ep_references.qmd) | Citations & bibliography |
